task_description: Replace the 7-engine cascade architecture (Genesis, Prometheus, CXN, MCE, thinking engine, decision engine) with a single LLM call per message. Delete all dead code, simplify mk_entry.cpp to: detect message type -> gather context (graph facts + history + tool output) -> one Groq API call -> response. Keep math_solver for instant math, conversation_mode for greeting detection, pattern_graph for RAG context, provider_router for fallback.
